text: The little prince travels through space and visits many planets discovering new worlds
On each planet he meets different people with unusual occupations and strange habits
He learns about vanity pride and the importance of what truly matters in life
The fox teaches him about friendship and the concept of taming someone special
He returns to his small planet B612 to take care of his beloved rose
The prince encounters a businessman counting stars obsessed with possession and wealth
A lamplighter faithfully lights and extinguishes his lamp following rules and duty
The rose represents love beauty and the bonds that connect us to others
The narrator crashes in the desert and meets the little prince by chance
The story explores themes of loneliness loss childhood innocence and human connection
